output:
Implemented T8 hot-path isolation work in the timeline editor. `TrackListRenderer` now localizes resize-clamp and selection props per row and memoizes `SortableRow` with a row-local comparator so unrelated rows keep stable props during drag/resize/scroll updates. Added selector helpers in `timelineStore.ts`, then switched `TimelineEditor` and `PreviewPanel` to shallow selector subscriptions instead of whole-slice subscriptions. Updated the preview persistence test mock surface for the new selector hooks.

Verification completed with `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/milestone-m1c-from-docs-state-20260416-2053/execution_batch_7.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Hand-finished the row hot path instead of relying on selector swaps alone. `TrackListRenderer` now localizes drag/resize-sensitive props per row (`isSelected`, row-local `clampedActionId`) and uses a custom `SortableRow` memo comparator so non-affected rows keep stable props during resize/scroll windows. Added narrow selector hooks in `timelineStore.ts`, then moved `TimelineEditor` and `PreviewPanel` to shallow selector subscriptions so they no longer subscribe to full data/ops/chrome/playback slices. Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`; `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The hot-path fan-out was reduced at the prop boundary itself: `TrackListRenderer` now computes row-local selection and clamp props before rendering `SortableRow`, and `SortableRow` uses a custom comparator keyed on row-local state so unrelated rows keep identical props through resize/scroll updates. `TimelineEditor` and `PreviewPanel` were also narrowed to shallow selector subscriptions so parent rerenders are less likely to invalidate row props indirectly.
